results.rendered_html:
sūpya (von sūpa)
1〉 adj. zu Brühen —, zu Suppen geeignet gaṇa apūpādi zu  P. 5,1,4 . ˚śāka  CARAKA 1,27 . ˚dhānya 8,6 .  VĀGBH. 1,6,26 .
— 2〉 n. Suppenspeise: mudgaḥ sūpyottamo mataḥ  CARAKA 1,27 .  VĀGBH. 1,6,95 .
